first_run.rationale: The scores are identical. The justification, strengths, and concerns all point to the exact same core assessment: the candidate has a strong systems and geospatial background but lacks the specific C++/Rust and distributed systems experience required for the role. The textual differences are minor rephrasings and reorderings that fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variance and do not represent a substantive change in the evaluation.
